match.userMessage:
Handheld micro-movement follows Scarlett's swipe as she applies a second layer of lipstick in the compact mirror, seated on the wooden bench with legs crossed. She completes the motion then breaks into a soft smile. Natural micro-jitters keep the energy tactile and immediate while staying locked on the action.

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves and faint promenade activity. subtle lipstick swipe, compact mirror click.
